MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PETITIONER THOMAS CHIN'S Petition For Writ Of Mandate From The Suspension Of Petitioner'S California Drivers License IS OFF CALENDAR. ENTIRE CASE DISMISSED ON 11/16/2010. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Loretta Najera, CSR # 5153 =(301/PJB)
